name: ComboBox
description: A filterable dropdown input allowing selection of one or more options from large lists. Supports keyboard navigation, custom filtering, grouped options, and controlled/uncontrolled patterns.

open.description: Controlled: Whether dropdown list is visible

multiselect.description: Enable multi-select mode; selected items display as pills

onSelectionChange.description: Required for controlled mode; fired on selection change

onChange.description: Fired when input text changes (filtering); required for controlled value

truncate.description: Truncate pill text in multi-select mode

OverlayProps.description: Props for overlay container (height, maxHeight, etc.)

endAdornment.description: Content after input (clear button, icon, etc.)

valueToString.description: Callback to convert option values to display strings (required for objects)

inputProps.description: Props passed to internal input element

value.description: Option value; can be string, object, number, etc.

states.open: Dropdown list visible; user can navigate/select
states.closed: Dropdown list hidden; input shows selected value or pills
states.readOnly: Selection visible but not editable; role='textbox'
states.validationError: Validation error state; visual error styling
states.validationWarning: Validation warning state; visual warning styling
states.focused: Input has keyboard focus; list opens automatically
states.multiSelectPills: Multi-select mode; selected items as removable pills

keyboard.Tab: Focus: single-select→next element; multi-select→pill list then next element. Highlighted option selected when list open.
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Reverse navigation. If list open, closes and selects highlighted option.
keyboard.Space: Types space character into input (not selection trigger)
keyboard.Escape: Close list without selection; focus on input
keyboard.ArrowUp: Closed: open+highlight last. Open: previous option or wrap
keyboard.ArrowDown: Closed: open+highlight first. Open: next option or wrap

aria.role: combobox (or textbox when readOnly=true); aria-multiselectable=true for multi-select
aria.ariaExpanded: Managed automatically; true when list open
aria.ariaControls: Points to OptionList ID for AT navigation
aria.ariaActivedescendant: Points to highlighted Option during navigation
aria.ariaLabel: Provide when input lacks visible label
aria.ariaLabelledby: Link to external label ID if label exists
aria.ariaDescribedby: Optional; points to helper text or validation message

selection-mode: Single-select (default): one option selectable; value displays in input
Multi-select (multiselect={true}): multiple options; display as pill tokens
control-pattern: Uncontrolled: defaultOpen, defaultSelected, defaultValue; internal state managed
Controlled: open, selected, value props + onOpenChange, onSelectionChange, onChange callbacks

advanced-patterns.grouped-options: Use OptionGroup with label; auto aria-labelledby linking
advanced-patterns.custom-filtering: Custom filter logic in onChange; match regex patterns
advanced-patterns.object-values: Set valueToString callback; converts {name, id} → display string
advanced-patterns.complex-options: Option children can have icons, descriptions, JSX layout
advanced-patterns.server-side-filtering: onChange triggers async fetch; populate Option from results
advanced-patterns.free-text-entry: Add dynamic Option if input doesn't match any option
advanced-patterns.select-on-tab: selectOnTab={true} selects highlighted option on Tab press

known-issues: Safari + VoiceOver on macOS 14 (early 15.x): Focus management broken in dropdown. W3C tracked. Workaround: Chrome/Firefox or macOS 15.1+
